programme.desc: S1 E47 Sandhya arrives at the Kothari doorstep where she confronts Ankur for lying. Meanwhile, Sooraj ponders upon Sandhya's conversation with Bhabho.
programme.title: Diya Aur Baati Hum

programme.desc: S1 E19 Daamini expresses gratitude to Hetal for supporting Sonal and Jigar's alliance. Meanwhile, Urmila and Rashi plan their next move.
programme.title: Saath Nibhaana Saathiya

programme.desc: S1 E161 Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.desc: S1 E118 Raushni supports her husband's dream of becoming an IAS officer. However, will a betrayal change her life and aspirations?
programme.title: Tod Kar Dil Mera

programme.desc: S1 E641 Anjali Awasthi is a lawyer that struggles to achieve recognition in her field. But this desire to be recognised leads her to take on a challenging case that could help her achieve her dreams.
programme.title: Advocate Anjali Awasthi

programme.desc: S1 E28 A reserved businessman who avoids romance crosses paths with an artist haunted by a bitter past, leaving the prospect of a budding romance hanging in the balance.
programme.title: Oh Humnava Tum Dena Saath Mera

programme.desc: S1 E103 Shivprasad lives a quiet life as a devoted husband and father, but he harbors a massive secret. Unknown to his family, he is also Parshuram, a highly skilled spy on dangerous missions.
programme.title: Mr & Mrs Parshuram

programme.desc: S1 E795 Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.
programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha

programme.desc: S1 E5165 Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.desc: S1 E2005 Anupama starts the process of restoring her café, but Prem gets angry with Rahi over the decision. Meanwhile, Vasundhara pressures Rahi to close the business for good.
programme.title: Anupamaa

programme.desc: S2 E268 Tulsi Virani sets the example of an ideal bahu, and a righteous matriarch.
programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi

programme.desc: S1 E909 Jhanak tries to overcome her underprivileged background to fulfil her dream of becoming a dancer. However, a man she once rejected is out for revenge against her.
programme.title: Jhanak

programme.desc: S1 E38 Stranded somewhere in an incomplete love story, Virat struggles to reconcile his emotions. Meanwhile, no one is around to help Sai as she drowns deeper in grief and gradually loses the will to live.
programme.title: Ghum Hai Kisikey Pyaar Meiin
